_publications._publicationTitle: Overcoming BET Inhibitor Resistance in Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumors.

_contextSnippet: We observed that this treatment regimen was well-tolerated in both cohorts...tumors treated with ARV771 experienced less per-tumor growth over the course of the nearly 3-week treatment
details: ARV771 treatment at 30 mg/kg was well-tolerated and tumors experienced less per-tumor growth over nearly 3-week treatment
